Author: SaMo (Dalamud v15 fork by Originaljsx)
Name: PvP Tracker
Punchline: PvP match history and stats tracker.
Description: Record, browse and filter your Crystalline Conflict, Frontline and Rival Wings match history, view match scoreboards and view aggregated statistics like win rate and average damage dealt per match. This is a community fork that restores compatibility with Dalamud API 15 (FFXIV patch 7.5).
Changelog: Updated for Dalamud API 15 (compatible with FFXIV patch 7.5). Adds Archeia Harmonias arena. Migrates ObjectKind.Player -> ObjectKind.Pc, IDutyStateEventArgs, ImRaii.ColorDisposable, AtkValueType, ActionEffectHandler.MemberFunctionPointers.Receive.
